mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SigninUser WHERE activity_name = #{activityName} and status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT u.id FROM Permissions p LEFT JOIN Groups_Permissions gp ON p.id = gp.permission_id LEFT JOIN PermissionGroups g ON gp.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN Roles_Groups rg ON g.id = rg.group_id LEFT JOIN Roles r ON rg.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN User u ON r.id = u.role_id WHERE p.id = #{permissionId}

SELECT DISTINCT u.id FROM Groups_Permissions gp LEFT JOIN PermissionGroups g ON gp.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN Roles_Groups rg ON g.id = rg.group_id LEFT JOIN Roles r ON rg.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN User u ON r.id = u.role_id WHERE gp.group_id = #{groupId}
select COUNT(*) from SigninUser where activity_name = #{activityName} and status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SigninUser WHERE activity_name = #{activityName} and status = 0
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notSigned, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed FROM SigninUser WHERE activity_name = #{activityName};
